recommendations.title: Good Will Hunting
recommendations.overview: Will Hunting is a headstrong, working-class genius who is failing the lessons of life. After one too many run-ins with the law, Will's last chance is a psychology professor, who might be the only man who can reach him.

recommendations.title: Elephant
recommendations.overview: Several ordinary high school students go through their daily routine as two others prepare for something more malevolent.

recommendations.title: Gerry
recommendations.overview: Two friends named Gerry become lost in the desert after taking a wrong turn. Their attempts to find their way home only lead them into further trouble.

recommendations.title: Restless
recommendations.overview: Two outsiders, both shaped by the circumstances that have brought them together, forge a deep and lasting love.

recommendations.title: The Sea of Trees
recommendations.overview: In Japan's Aokigahara Forest, a troubled teacher meets a mysterious lost stranger who takes him on a life-changing journey of love and redemption.

recommendations.title: Paranoid Park
recommendations.overview: A teenage skateboarder becomes suspected of being connected with a security guard who suffered a brutal death in a skate park called "Paranoid Park".

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, He Won't Get Far on Foot
recommendations.overview: On the rocky path to sobriety after a life-changing accident, John Callahan discovers the healing power of art, willing his injured hands into drawing hilarious, often controversial cartoons, which bring him a new lease on life.

recommendations.title: Drugstore Cowboy
recommendations.overview: Portland, Oregon, 1971. Bob Hughes is the charismatic leader of a peculiar quartet, formed by his wife, Dianne, and another couple, Rick and Nadine, who skillfully steal from drugstores and hospital medicine cabinets in order to appease their insatia

recommendations.title: Psycho
recommendations.overview: A young female embezzler arrives at the Bates Motel, which has terrible secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: Promised Land
recommendations.overview: A salesman for a natural gas company experiences life-changing events after arriving in a small town, where his corporation wants to tap into the available resources.
